mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_erp_material WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_erp_material WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_erp_material WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM tb_erp_material WHERE deleted = 0
AND (material_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR material_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR chemical_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cas_number LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_erp_material ( material_code, material_name, chemical_name, cas_number, supplier, stock_quantity, unit, unit_price, last_incoming_date, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{chemicalName}, #{casNumber}, #{supplier}, #{stockQuantity}, #{unit}, #{unitPrice}, #{lastIncomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{deleted}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_erp_material SET material_code = #{materialCode}, material_name = #{materialName}, chemical_name = #{chemicalName}, cas_number = #{casNumber}, supplier = #{supplier}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, unit = #{unit}, unit_price = #{unitPrice}, last_incoming_date = #{lastIncomingDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_erp_material SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
